flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at San Diego Miramar College fell 31% between 2009 and 2010 (15.2% → 10.4%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at San Diego Miramar College rose 31% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.7k → $3.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at San Diego Miramar College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.5k → $10.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at San Diego Miramar College rose 12% between 2007 and 2010 ($586 → $658).
